properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v3 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God in my living There in my breathing God in my waking God in my sleeping

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God in my resting There in my working God in my thinking God in my speaking

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be my everything Be my everything Be my everything Be my everything

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God in my hoping There in my dreaming God in my watching God in my waiting

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God in my laughing There in my weeping God in my hurting God in my healing

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Christ in me Christ in me Christ in me the hope of glory You are everything

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Christ in me Christ in me Christ in me the hope of glory Be my everything
